item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline kits containing Huons Co. Bupivacaine HCL in Dextrose Injection, USP, labeled as: 1) BLOCK TRAY, Medline Kit SKU DYNJRA1181C; 2) SPI Recall
item.product: Medline kits containing Huons Co. Bupivacaine HCL in Dextrose Injection, USP, labeled as: 1) BLOCK TRAY, Medline Kit SKU DYNJRA1181C; 2) SPI
item.summary: Medline kits were distributed containing Huons Bupivacaine Hydrochloride in Dextrose Injection, USP, which was subsequently recalled due to quality issues, including microbiology testing data integrity concerns and reported efficacy complaints. Product details: Medline kits containing Huons Co. Bupivacaine HCL in Dextrose Injection, USP, labeled as: 1) BLOCK TRAY, Medline Kit SKU DYNJRA1181C; 2) SPINAL BLOCK 25G WHTCRE 5S BU, Medline Kit SKu DYNJRA1860.
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution in the US Territory of Virgin Islands and the countries of Bahamas, Panama, Barbados.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
